overview: Functional Medicine Institute delivers primary, functional, and specialty care with a root-cause approach to address acute and chronic health conditions. Services are available in-person at locations in Idaho and via telemedicine across Idaho, Oregon, Washington, and Utah.
highlights: Advanced diagnostic testing and extended in-depth functional consultations
In-office minor surgical procedures including IUD insertion and skin treatments
Same-day acute care for existing patients
targetAudience: Patients and families seeking comprehensive functional medicine with a root-cause approach to complex or chronic health conditions across all ages.
